title: National Sports Supporter Campaign Poster AI
sourceTitle: National Sports Supporter Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Hyper-realistic national sports supporter campaign poster for Japan, designed with world-class FIFA/World Cup ultra-premium advertising scale. Subject: Tens of thousands of Japan supporters fill Shibuya Crossing transformed into a stadium district, waving national flags, scarves, jerseys, flares, banners, and smoke bombs during final group-stage night, one match from history. Scene: A massive iconic city square or stadium district of Japan with landmarks, architecture, cultural patterns, city lights, fireworks, atmospheric haze, and national identity visible within one second. Composition: Vertical 4:5 blockbuster sports poster with a dense supporter crowd at the base, monumental skyline depth, gigantic colored smoke waves rising upward, and a colossal national symbolic creature or cultural icon forming in the sky. Signature Elements: National flags, scarves, jerseys, flares, banners, smoke bombs, iconic landmarks, monumental colored smoke creature, detailed crowd faces, patriotic scale, and luxury sports advertising finish. Style: World-class FIFA/World Cup ultra-premium sports advertising look with Hollywood blockbuster scale, luxury campaign polish, ultra-realistic skin and crowd detail, dynamic perspective, epic depth, and award-winning sports-poster composition. Color Palette: Country-coded flag colors, dramatic smoke color, stadium floodlight whites, flare reds and golds, glowing city-night tones, realistic crowd color variation, and premium cinematic grading. Lighting: Massive stadium floodlights, volumetric fog, glowing city lights, fireworks, flare lighting, realistic reflections, atmospheric haze, dynamic shadows, and high-contrast sports photography drama. Typography: BLUE FIRE RISES appears as a bold readable campaign slogan integrated into banners or poster hierarchy, without official logos or fake federation branding. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.
